**Architecture And Separation Of Concerns**

No boundary violations found. **Functional Paradigm**

Pass. The core change uses iterator composition (`iter`, `filter_map`, `then`, `collect`) at [drift.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-73d98a98/crates/jit/src/validation/drift.rs:257). Imperative code is limited to command/CLI orchestration and tests.

The validation severity is now fixed to error for the sole remaining drift direction at [validate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-73d98a98/crates/jit/src/commands/validate.rs:385).
